fullText:
BREAKING: Florida's Attorney General says looksmaxxer Clavicular could face "a lot of time behind bars" for shooting an alligator on stream. 

Only a 17% chance Clavicular is sentenced to prison. https://t.co/tRuG2kJq5x

fullText: BREAKING: OpenAI's Sora video platform was reportedly losing ~$1,000,000.00 per day before they decided to shut it down.
